case_title: MACMURRAY PACIFIC VS. KELLY B CAMPBELL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,311.09 FILED BY MACMURRAY PACIFIC AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, KELLY B ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
